result:
Report filed at `/home/nate/charos/haros-events/housekeeping/dnsmasq-circ-dep-report.md`.

**TL;DR:** Not really circular — it was `bind-interfaces=true` + `listen-address=100.110.214.44` (tailscale IP) with no ordering on `tailscaled`. WiFi died → no tailscale0 → dnsmasq couldn't bind `100.110.214.44` (`EADDRNOTAVAIL`) → 5 retries in <1s → `StartLimitBurst` give-up → name resolution gone → Dad locked out. Already hot-fixed at ~02:18 EDT (`bind-interfaces` → `bind-dynamic`); dnsmasq healthy since 02:19:24. Risk now low; ~10 min of hardening (soft `wants/after=tailscaled.service`, resolv.conf audit, commit + drop .bak) closes it out.
